texto: There is no greater feeling in business than building a product which impacts people's lives in a profound way. When we look around at the thousands of people who have attended Summit gatherings, it makes us smile to see the new friendships, business partnerships and philanthropic initiatives that each event produces.
explicacao: Citação de Elliott Bisnow sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “There is no greater feeling in business than building a product which impacts people's lives in a…” articula amizade, business, partnerships em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e partnerships.
